rationale: Both candidates independently find the exact latent gap (the unswept get_cache_scale call in hunyuan_image3_transformer.py), but Y verifies it more rigorously by checking the actual upstream vLLM source (AutoWeightsLoader, weight_utils.py, fp8.py) to confirm the delegated-loader design is correct, and separately confirms whether the diffusion loader gap was later fixed — X merely assumes PR #4808 already covers it without verification, which is a weaker, less-grounded claim. Y also lands a sharper, more substantive test-coverage finding (the delegated-loader test never actually exercises the outer AutoWeightsLoader mapping it depends on) that echoes the ground truth's concern about the test only using a fake param rather than validating against real behavior; X's parallel findings (double-mapping confirmation request, comment-wording nits, assert-order nit) are comparatively low-value and partly speculative. Both are file/line-grounded and actionable, but Y's recommendations are more concrete fixes versus X's more cosmetic suggestions.
